title: DANİEL & İSABELLA
subtitle: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite.
label: StudioOfPages Memories
date: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite.
message: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite.
coupleQuote: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite.
letter: Dear Isabella,From the moment we met, life became brighter in ways I never imagined. Every smile, every adventure, and every quiet moment we've shared has become a memory I treasure forever.Thank you for being my best friend, my greatest support, and the love of my life. No matter where our journey takes us, my heart will always choose you.Here's to every memory we've created and every beautiful chapter still waiting for us.Forever yours,Daniel
thankYouText: Thank you for visiting our memories.
